events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need assess scenario: heavy industrial site, Sitework & Utilities, Equipment safety, observed field condition: riding in bucket. Work actively in progress. Reference OSHA 1926 Subpart O. Need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. Riding in bucket likely personnel riding in excavator/loader bucket, prohibited by OSHA 1926.601(b)(9) maybe? Subpart O Motor Vehicles, Mechanized Equipment, and Marine Operations. Specifically 1926.601(b)(9): No person shall be permitted to ride on any load, hook, sling, or bucket. Also 1926.602(c)(1)(iv) maybe. So fail, high/critical risk. Need produce JSON with fields. Need include component_conditions maybe non-compliant. Findings: personnel riding in equipment bucket, violation. Actions: stop work, remove personnel, retrain, discipline, use man lift/ladder/scaffold, inspect. Rationale. References: OSHA 1926.601(b)(9), 1926.602(c)(1)(iv). Need ensure valid JSON. No prose outside.

    "Riding in a bucket is a prohibited use of material-handling equipment for personnel transport.",
    "Exposes worker to struck-by, caught-in, fall, and crushing hazards with limited means of escape or fall protection."

    "Immediately stop the equipment and direct the worker to exit the bucket safely.",
    "Halt related work until a safe means of access/egress or personnel lift is provided.",

    "Document the violation and notify site supervision and safety officer."
